L1_headline: HOLX – Q1 FY2026 earnings released amid pending Blackstone/TPG acquisition. | 01/29/26
L2_brief: Hologic reported Q1 FY2026 financial results for the quarter ended December 27, 2025. The filing references the pending acquisition by affiliates of Blackstone Inc. and TPG Capital, for which a Definitive Proxy Statement was filed with the SEC on December 23, 2025 and mailed to stockholders. No changes to deal terms or timeline were disclosed in this filing.

L3_detailed.event: Hologic issued a press release announcing financial results for Q1 FY2026 (quarter ended December 27, 2025). The 8-K also includes standard disclosure language regarding the proposed acquisition by Blackstone and TPG affiliates.
key_figures: Definitive Proxy Statement filed with SEC on December 23, 2025
L3_detailed.deal_implications: The filing does not disclose any changes to the proposed Blackstone/TPG acquisition terms, timeline, or conditions. Hologic continues to operate and report earnings while the transaction is pending. The stockholder vote date was not specified in this filing.
remaining_conditions: Stockholder approval (Definitive Proxy Statement filed and mailed; vote date not specified in this filing)
Regulatory approvals (not detailed in this filing)
Other customary closing conditions (not detailed in this filing)
risks_flagged: Filing contains forward-looking statements with cautionary language noting actual results could differ materially from those expressed or implied
